description: 🇪🇺 The EU is preparing to start payments to Ukraine for a loan of 90 billion euros 👥 The European Union may soon open financing for Ukraine within the framework of a large-scale loan program of 90 billion euros. The first funds are expected already in May, if all the necessary decisions are made at the EU level. 👤 Deputy Minister of Foreign Affairs of Latvia Artjoms Urshulskis said that he is counting on the start of payments...
description_en: 🇪🇺 The EU is preparing to start payments to Ukraine for a loan of 90 billion euros 👥 The European Union may soon open financing for Ukraine within the framework of a large-scale loan program of 90 billion euros. description_uk: 🇪🇺 ЄС готується розпочати виплати Україні за кредитом у 90 млрд євро 👥 Європейський Союз може вже найближчим часом відкрити фінансування для України в межах масштабної кредитної програми на 90 млрд євро. Перші кошти очікуються вже у травні, якщо буде ухвалено всі необхідні рішення на рівні ЄС. 👤 Заступник міністра закордонних справ Латвії Артьомс Уршульскіс заявив, що розраховує на старт виплат...

title: Kyiv: Drone strike
title_en: Kyiv: Drone strike

description: Ukrainian drones hit key Russian oil hub in Samara Oblast, SBU says. Ukrainian drones caused a "massive fire" at the Samara oil distribution station in Russia's Samara Oblast overnight on April 21, a source in the Security Service of Ukraine (SBU) told the Kyiv Independent.
description_en: Ukrainian drones hit key Russian oil hub in Samara Oblast, SBU says. Ukrainian drones caused a "massive fire" at the Samara oil distribution station in Russia's Samara Oblast overnight on April 21, a source in the Security Service of Ukraine (SBU) told the Kyiv Independent.

title: Kyiv: 143 drones intercepted
title_en: Kyiv: 143 drones intercepted
title_uk: Київ: перехоплено 143 дрони
description: At least 6 killed, 59 injured in Russian strikes across Ukraine over past day Russian forces launched 143 drones against Ukraine overnight, of which 116 were downed or jammed, the Air Force reported on April 21. Russia also launched two Iskander-M ballistic missiles, one of which was intercepted by Ukraine's air defense.
description_en: At least 6 killed, 59 injured in Russian strikes across Ukraine over past day Russian forces launched 143 drones against Ukraine overnight, of which 116 were downed or jammed, the Air Force reported on April 21. Russia also launched two Iskander-M ballistic missiles, one of which was intercepted by Ukraine's air defense.

Russia also launched two Iskander-M ballistic missiles, one of which was intercepted by Ukraine's air defense.

title: Kyiv: Today, the key point is that, together with all regions and...

title_uk: Київ: Сьогодні ключовим є те, що разом з усіма регіонами та...
description: Today, the key point is that, together with all regions and government officials, we are reviewing the work on energy and infrastructure facilities. These are facilities that are critical for getting through the winter and that must be fully operational and reliably protected for the next heating season. We made it through this winter, and it was very difficult. I thank everyone who truly worked...

description: Today, the most important thing is that we are checking work with energy and infrastructure facilities with all regions and government officials. These are facilities that are critical for getting through the winter and must be fully functional and reliably protected for the next heating season. We passed this winter, it was very difficult. Thanks to everyone who really worked to help our people overcome the consequences of the Russian strikes. No one...

Thanks to everyone who really worked to help our people overcome the consequences of the Russian strikes. No one...
description_uk: Сьогодні найголовніше – з усіма регіонами та з урядовцями ми перевіряємо роботу з об’єктами енергетики та інфраструктури. Це обʼєкти, критичні для проходження зими і які на наступний опалювальний сезон мають бути повністю функціональні та надійно захищені. Ми пройшли цю зиму, було дуже непросто. Дякую всім, хто справді працював, щоб допомогти нашим людям подолати наслідки російських ударів. Ніхто...

title: Kyiv: Russian preschools, schools, universities have spent over $213...
title_en: Kyiv: Russian preschools, schools, universities have spent over $213...

description: Russian preschools, schools, universities have spent over $213 million on ‘educational’ drones since 2022, media reports. The figure, calculated in an investigation by the Russian independent media outlet Novaya Gazeta Europe reported on April 20, comes as Russia continues to militarize its society, with a specific focus on children.
